_note: مكتبة محتوى النظام (source=system). كل عنصر يُولَّد بـ 5 ستايلات مختلفة (photo/3D/vector/cartoon/watercolor) مع تنويع الخلفية واللون والزاوية والإضاءة، إضافةً لتنويع الجسم نفسه عبر subjects. عدّل هنا ثم شغّل: python3 tools/generate_content_images.py
common: exactly one single complete object, only one item, no duplicates, no extra copies, no split parts, centered composition, isolated, clearly recognizable for a toddler, child-friendly, no text, no words, no watermark, square 1:1
_sectionNote: sections = صور «الجزء»: الفاكهة/الخضار مقطوعة تُظهر الداخل مع بقاء الملامح واضحة. تُولَّد بعد الصور العادية (ملفات 6.jpg فصاعداً) وتُقرَن بالستايلات بالتناوب.
sectionCommon: cut open to clearly show the inside cross-section while staying clearly recognizable as the same fruit or vegetable, one piece shown whole and one piece cut open side by side, characteristic skin color and shape still visible, centered composition, isolated on a plain simple background, clearly recognizable for a toddler, child-friendly, no text, no words, no watermark, square 1:1

styles.prompt: professional real photograph, DSLR, eye-level straight-on view, soft natural daylight, plain white seamless studio background, photorealistic, sharp focus
cute 3D rendered CGI illustration, smooth glossy materials, three-quarter top-down angle, soft studio lighting with gentle shadows, smooth pastel blue gradient background, high detail
flat vector illustration, bold clean simple shapes, front-facing view, even flat lighting, solid mint green background, minimal sticker style

bold 2D cartoon illustration, thick clean black outlines, flat bright cel-shaded colors, simple playful preschool cartoon style, slight low angle, bright cheerful lighting, soft warm peach pastel background
delicate pencil sketch with soft watercolor wash, hand-painted artistic, three-quarter side angle, gentle diffused light, textured cream paper background, muted soft colors
